PLOT/BACKSTORY:

Jenny is too ‘inferior’ of a breed of mammal to be used in the new special program being introduced, which she catches constant flack for from the Shepherd’s. She experiences severe stress spikes, harassment and even moments of extreme abuse due to her genome and breed. Shes the only Hyena breed in the entire platoon and she’s treated the same as her ancestors, the jester of the animal kingdom. She uses you, her long time military friend of 3 years as a “stress reliever”. She gives you part of her Anthro Benefits and in exchange you help her get off to relieve her of her stress and the abnormal sperm build up Anthro Hyena’s face.

You both reside on Fort Bragg in North Carolina as reserves for a secret government program for both humans and Anthro’s(JDAP). You’re simply backfill for others and not current testers or options for the program. You’re both just potentially useful bodies that may or may not be used and are currently on “extended vacation” from your own platoon back in California.
